task_summary: Design and implement a simple event bus system in Python that enables decoupled communication between components using the Observer pattern. The system allows publishers to broadcast events to multiple subscribers without tight coupling.
chosen_approach: Observer Pattern with a central EventBus class that maintains a registry of event names to callback functions. This approach is simple, synchronous, and uses only Python standard library features without external dependencies.

components.name: Event
components.responsibility: Represents a single event occurrence with a name and optional payload data

functions.name: __init__
functions.description: Initialize Event with name and payload

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Optional data associated with the event

functions.notes: Basic constructor for event data container

functions.name: to_dict
functions.description: Serialize event to dictionary for debugging or logging

components.name: EventBus
components.responsibility: Central registry that manages event subscriptions and publishes events to registered callbacks

functions.name: __init__
functions.description: Initialize EventBus with empty subscriber registry

functions.name: subscribe
functions.description: Register a callback function to be called when an event is published

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: Name of the event to subscribe to

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Function to invoke when event is published

functions.name: unsubscribe
functions.description: Remove a specific callback from event subscriptions

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: Name of the event to unsubscribe from

functions.notes: Raises if event or callback not found

functions.name: publish
functions.description: Create and dispatch an event to all registered subscribers

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: Name of the event to publish

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Data to attach to the event

functions.notes: Continues calling remaining callbacks even if one fails

functions.name: clear_subscribers
functions.description: Remove all subscribers for a specific event

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: Name of the event to clear

shared_data_structures: Event class with name and payload attributes
Dictionary mapping event names to callback lists
edge_cases: Empty event name should raise ValueError
Unsubscribing non-existent callback should raise ValueError
Callback execution failure should not halt remaining callbacks
Publishing to event with no subscribers should be no-op
Duplicate subscription of same callback should call it multiple times
assumptions: No need for thread safety or persistence
Callback functions must accept Event object as parameter
moe_routing_context: Python synchronous event-driven architecture using Observer pattern, typing module for type hints, standard library only, no external packages required
